description: Comopsition Dark grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Do not dry clean Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach or scrub Tumble dry Warm iron; but do not iron on print With a bold logo and smudge print, this Levi's T-shirt is a definite show stopper. Fusing a classic look with artsy goth, you cannot go wrong with this casual essential. Team this tee with faded jeans and colourful sneakers to pull off the rebel-without-a-cause look, or wear it with subtler demins for a classier style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
